Ant-Man (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $180,202,163Details
International Box Office $338,656,286
Worldwide Box Office $518,858,449
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $36,980,652
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $33,232,321
Total $70,212,973
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The next evolution of the Marvel Cinematic Universe brings a founding member of The Avengers to the big screen for the first time with Marvel Studios' "Ant-Man." Armed with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, master thief Scott Lang must embrace his inner-hero and help his mentor, Dr. Hank Pym, protect the secret behind his spectacular Ant-Man suit from a new generation of towering threats. Against seemingly insurmountable obstacles, Pym and Lang must plan and pull off a heist that will save the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$57,225,526 (31.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,856 opening theaters/3,868 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $255,660,488

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 17th, 2015 (Wide) by Walt Disney
July 17th, 2015 (IMAX) by Walt Disney

July 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Thailand)

July 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Belgium)

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

The next evolution of the Marvel Cinematic Universe brings a founding member of The Avengers to the big screen for the first time with Marvel Studios' "Ant-Man." Armed with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, master thief Scott Lang must embrace his inner-hero and help his mentor, Dr. Hank Pym, protect the secret behind his spectacular Ant-Man suit from a new generation of towering threats. Against seemingly insurmountable obstacles, Pym and Lang must plan and pull off a heist that will save the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$57,225,526 (31.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,856 opening theaters/3,868 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $255,660,488
